_comment: Synthetic fixture — proves the interpreter parses production-style stringified-JSON wire shape WITH a known built-in recipe (not just custom_ slugs like fixture 12). Same schema fields as 12-production-holding-on (stringified item_display_recipes, stringified content_metadata, flattened actor_*) but the slugs reference cinematic_fullscreen (built-in). The engine MUST resolve this to the same BehaviorConfig as fixture 02-cinematic-fullscreen, proving parsing + cascade behave identically across clean + production wire shapes. This is what we mean by 'don't wait on platform data entry to validate production shape parity'.
name: Production-Shape Built-in Recipe Conformance Fixture
description: Built-in recipe slug carried in the production stringified-JSON wire shape.
